title: ancistrorhynchus ovatus
intro: Ancistrorhynchus ovatus is a flowering plant species, commonly known as the yellow and red orchid or the red and yellow orchid. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ancistrorhynchus ovatus include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or poultices for topical application, and are often used in folk medicine in tropical regions.
